subject: english
description: 関係副詞 where / when / why / how を使って、場所・時・理由などを説明します。

questions.question: This is the place ___ I was born. (場所)
questions.explanation: 場所を表す関係副詞は where です

questions.question: I remember the day ___ I met you. (時)
questions.explanation: 時を表す関係副詞は when です

questions.question: Tell me the reason ___ you were late. (理由)
questions.explanation: 理由を表す関係副詞は why です

questions.question: This is the house ___ I lived. (場所)
questions.explanation: 場所を表す関係副詞は where です

questions.question: Do you know the time ___ he arrived? (時)
questions.explanation: 時を表す関係副詞は when です

questions.question: I don't know the reason ___ she is angry. (理由)
questions.explanation: 理由を表す関係副詞は why です

questions.question: This is the park ___ we often play. (場所)
questions.explanation: 場所を表す関係副詞は where です

questions.question: I'll never forget the summer ___ I went to America. (時)
questions.explanation: 時を表す関係副詞は when です

questions.question: That is the museum ___ we visited. (場所)
questions.explanation: 場所を表す関係副詞は where です

questions.question: I know the reason ___ he quit. (理由)
questions.explanation: 理由を表す関係副詞は why です
